description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docker images build and push that runs on a workflow dispatch. The workflow consists of two jobs: obtain-dockerfiles and build-and-push. The obtain-dockerfiles job runs on a self-hosted Linux environment, checks out the develop branch, and uploads the dockerfiles to be used in the build-and-push job. The build-and-push job also runs on a self-hosted Linux environment, downloads the dockerfiles, sets up QEMU and Docker Buildx, logs in to the GitHub Container Registry, and builds and pushes a Docker image using the docker/bake-action.
